topics: Basic Operational Concepts - Bus Structures. Memory Locations and Addresses - Memory Operations, Instructions and Instruction Sequencing, Addressing Modes. Basic Processing Unit
Execution of a Complete Instruction - Single Bus and Multiple Bus Organization
Arithmetic, Logic and Shift Micro-Operations. Processor Logic Design
Arithmetic Logic Unit - Design of Arithmetic Circuit
Microprogram Sequencing. Arithmetic Algorithms: Signed-Operand Multiplication
Fast Multiplication - Bit Pair Recoding of Multipliers. Pipelining: Basic Principles
Instruction and Arithmetic Pipelines (Design Examples Not Required)
Cache Memories - Mapping Functions. I/O Organization: Characteristics of I/O Devices
Data Transfer Schemes - Programmed Controlled I/O Transfer
Interrupt Controlled I/O Transfer. Organization of Interrupts - Vectored Interrupts - Servicing of Multiple Input/Output Devices - Polling and Daisy Chaining Schemes. Direct Memory Access (DMA)
